title: Toyland ® 10cm Squeezee Goo Novelty Fuzzy Balls – 3 Colours Available - 1 Chosen At Random – Fidget Fun Toys
features: These Goo fuzzy balls are amazing for lots of fidget fun. Also great for helping to reduce stress and anxiety, while helping concentration.
Squish, squash and squeeze these fidget toys to satisfy your fidget needs. The sensory toy is also great for playtime! Hours of fun are to be had developing co-ordination and prompting imagination.
They make a brilliant gift for Birthdays, Christmas, as a treat or a fantastic addition to party bags and stockings

Being small and lightweight, you can take this fidget fun toy on the go, or simply keep it to hand at home. These colourful fuzzy stress balls are available in Green, Blue & Red making them fun to collect and swap with friends!
One ball will be chosen at random. Suitable for 3+ years.
